title: Crunchy Spicy Ukrainian Sweet Potato Bowl
description: A sweet, crunchy, postworkout bowl that blends tender sousvide chicken with roasted sweet potatoes and chickpeas, finished with a zesty applecider dressing.
instructions: Preheat the sous‑vide water bath to 150°F (65°C).

Season the chicken breasts with smoked paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper, and a pinch of salt substitute. Place in a vacuum‑sealed bag with a light drizzle of olive oil and cook sous‑vide for 90 minutes.

While the chicken cooks, toss the diced sweet potatoes with 2 tbsp of olive oil, smoked paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper, and salt substitute. Roast in a 425°F (220°C) oven for 25 minutes, turning halfway.

In a separate bowl, coat the chickpeas with 2 tbsp olive oil, smoked paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper, and a pinch of salt substitute, then spread on a baking sheet and roast in the same oven for 20 minutes.
Whisk the apple cider vinegar with 1 tsp olive oil and a pinch of black pepper to make a quick dressing.
When the chicken is done, remove it from the bag, pat dry, and sear in a hot skillet for 1–2 minutes on each side to develop color.
Assemble the bowl by layering shredded cabbage, shredded carrot, roasted sweet potatoes, roasted chickpeas, and sliced seared chicken.
Drizzle the apple‑cider dressing over the bowl, toss gently, and serve immediately. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.
